hero.title: Your garden in the best hands
Your garden in the best hands. Well-kept, clear and professionally maintained.
hero.text: {{companyName}} provides high-quality garden care for private and business clients in Southern Styria.

faq.question: How often should the lawn be mowed?
faq.answer: In peak season we usually recommend an interval of 7 to 14 days, depending on growth.

faq.question: Which areas do you cover?
faq.answer: We work in the Leibnitz, Graz, Wagna, Gralla, Tillmitsch and Straß region and nearby.

faq.question: Do you offer garden care for businesses?
faq.answer: Yes, we also support company sites, residential complexes and public facilities with recurring intervals.

faq.question: How can I request a quote?
faq.answer: The fastest way is through our contact form or by phone. We usually respond within 24 hours.

faq.question: How much does hedge care cost?
faq.answer: Costs depend on length, height and accessibility. After a short coordination, we provide a clear quote.
